title: lithocardium adnatum
intro: Lithocardium adnatum, also known as Lithospermum officinale, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Lithocardium adnatum include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Lithocardium adnatum can be found in various forms, including tinctures, capsules, and infusions, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
